name: Crockpot Carmel Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. In a crockpot, combine the caramels and water. Cover and cook on high for 1 to 1½ hours, stirring frequently.
2. Wash and dry the apples.
3. Insert a stick into the stem end of each apple.
4. Turn the control to low.
5. Dip each apple into hot caramel and turn to coat the entire surface.
6. Holding the apple above the pot, scrape off any excess caramel accumulation from the bottom.
7. Place the apples on greased wax paper to cool.
